svg.title: How ARALyti.cs Works
svg.desc: A step-by-step visual guide to the ARALyti.cs learning analysis workflow.
svg.text: Enter your name — one-time access, no passwords needed. Dashboard loads instantly.
Browse and select any C# source file from your machine using the file picker.
Keyword engine reads the file, strips comments, and flags programming concepts used.
Detected concepts matched to 12 structured topics. Each scored 0–100 based on usage.
Engine identifies your weakest gap and tells you exactly what to study next — with context.
Charts render your skill level, top and bottom topics, and overall progress.
Write notes, reflect on what you built. Every entry is timestamped per project.
Track every project · Grow every day · You've got this 💜
ARALyti.cs v1.0.0 · Built for C# learners
